description: Black wallet which has a removable card holder in the front, has white stitch detailingRemovable card holder has three card slots and one ID card slot, embossed brandingTwo main compartments, the left fold has three card slots and two slip pockets, the right fold has a slip pocket and a zipped coin pocket with a small slotWarranty: 180 days against manufacturing defectsWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
